title: Standardized SPME-GC-MS Protocol for Detection of Volatile Compounds in Serum
author: Lilia C. Soler-Jiménez
materials: Precondition the DVB/CAR/PDMS fiber as per manufacturer instructions.
Compare VOC profiles between Chagas-positive and negative groups.

steps.title: In a 1.5 mL tube, mix
steps.instruction: In a 1.5 mL tube, mix: o 100 µL of blood serum o 200 µL of HPLC-grade methanol

steps.title: Let stand at room temperature for...
steps.instruction: Let stand at room temperature for 15 minutes to allow protein precipitation.

steps.title: Transfer the clear supernatant to a 0
steps.instruction: Transfer the clear supernatant to a 0.5 mL Eppendorf tube.

steps.title: Store the supernatant at 4°C if...
steps.instruction: Store the supernatant at 4°C if not analyzed immediately (up to 24 hours).

steps.title: Introduce the DVB/CAR/PDMS SPME fiber directly into the serum supernatant
steps.instruction: Introduce the DVB/CAR/PDMS SPME fiber directly into the serum supernatant.

steps.title: Allow extraction to proceed for 30 minutes at room temperature
steps.instruction: Allow extraction to proceed for 30 minutes at room temperature.

steps.title: Immediately transfer the fiber to the...
steps.instruction: Immediately transfer the fiber to the GC inlet for thermal desorption. Optional : For volatile-only profiling, perform headspace extraction at 40 °C.

steps.title: Desorb the fiber in the GC...
steps.instruction: Desorb the fiber in the GC injector at 270 °C for 5 min in splitless mode.

steps.title: Run GC-MS with the specified temperature program
steps.instruction: Run GC-MS with the specified temperature program.

steps.title: Acquire mass spectra in full scan mode (m/z 50–650)
steps.instruction: Acquire mass spectra in full scan mode (m/z 50–650).

steps.title: Identify compounds using the NIST library (Salek et al 2013)
steps.instruction: Identify compounds using the NIST library (Salek et al 2013).

steps.title: Normalize peak areas and calculate retention...
steps.instruction: Normalize peak areas and calculate retention indices (Sun and Stremple 2003).

steps.title: Perform all extractions in triplicate to assess reproducibility
steps.instruction: Perform all extractions in triplicate to assess reproducibility.

steps.title: Regularly clean the injector port and...
steps.instruction: Regularly clean the injector port and replace the septum to avoid carryover.

steps.title: Ensure fibers are properly conditioned before use
steps.instruction: Ensure fibers are properly conditioned before use.

steps.title: Store samples and extracts cold to avoid degradation
steps.instruction: Store samples and extracts cold to avoid degradation.
